# crowci_forges (Data Source)

Fetches the list of forges configured in Crow CI.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "crowci_forges" "all" {}

output "forge_urls" {
  value = [for f in data.crowci_forges.all.forges : f.url]
}

output "forge_types" {
  value = [for f in data.crowci_forges.all.forges : { id = f.id, type = f.type }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `forges` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--forges))

<a id="nestedatt--forges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `forges`

Read-Only:

- `client` (String) OAuth client ID.
- `icon` (String) Icon URL for the forge.
- `id` (Number) Forge ID.
- `oauth_host` (String) OAuth host if different from the forge URL.
- `skip_verify` (Boolean) Whether TLS verification is skipped.
- `type` (String) Forge type (e.g. github, gitlab, gitea).
- `url` (String) Base URL of the forge.
